lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

The car is in poor condition. The body has significant rust and multiple large dents. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the upholstery. The mechanical systems require major repairs, and the engine is not running reliably.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior has significant rust on the rocker panels, a cracked windshield, and several large dents along the passenger side. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with several tears in the seats and a persistent odor. Mechanically, the engine runs but has a noticeable oil leak, and the suspension requires immediate attention as it makes a loud clunking sound over bumps. The tires are also near the end of their tread life. This car would be best suited as a parts vehicle or a major project for someone with the tools and time to perform extensive repairs.

This vehicle is in poor overall condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior shows significant signs of age and neglect, including several large dents, noticeable rust spots on the wheel arches, and clear coat failure on the hood and roof. Inside, the interior requires extensive work; the upholstery is heavily torn, and there is a persistent musty odor. Mechanically, the car is not currently roadworthy. The engine runs roughly with a loud knock, the transmission slips when shifting into higher gears, and the brakes are unresponsive. This vehicle would be best suited as a donor car for parts or a major restoration project for an experienced mechanic.

This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior from regular use. All major mechanical systems are functioning properly, and the car has been well-maintained.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project seekers! This is your chance to own this model at an incredible price. It’s seen a lot of miles and will need some dedicated mechanical work and cosmetic repairs to get back to its best, but it’s a wonderful opportunity for someone looking for a budget-friendly fixer-upper. Perfect for a hobbyist ready for their next weekend project!

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. Every component has been evaluated to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and driver comfort. Invest in a vehicle that balances sophisticated engineering with proven durability.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride. It’s been such a reliable car for me and is still in really solid shape! It’s super clean, runs smoothly, and is perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road whenever you are. I’d love to see it go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have—feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis has been addressed with critical subframe reinforcement and the VANOS system has been serviced to ensure optimal variable valve timing. It retains its factory-spec limited-slip differential and features refreshed suspension bushings for precise lateral stability. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina, the mechanical vitals are robust, providing a tactile, analog experience with a linear power delivery all the way to the 8,000 RPM redline.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance. Clean title.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful driving. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, featuring supple leather seating and a fully functional infotainment suite. Mechanically, it is sound; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and all scheduled maintenance is up to date. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes are responsive. It’s a solid, dependable car that has been cared for with pride, ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, balancing mechanical integrity with sophisticated presentation. Meticulously maintained and showing consistent pride of ownership, it offers a reliable and refined driving experience that meets our rigorous standards for quality. A premier choice for those seeking a balance of performance and value in a pre-owned executive transport.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and aesthetic appeal. This selection has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical reliability and driver comfort. An ideal acquisition for the professional seeking a balance of luxury and proven durability, this vehicle represents a premier value in its class.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride, and I think you're going to love it! It’s in really solid, reliable shape and has been a total joy to drive. Whether you're commuting to work or heading out on a road trip, this car is ready to go and looks great doing it. It's been well-cared for and is just waiting for its next adventure—come check it out!
This 2005 Porsche 911 Carrera (997.1) represents a mechanically sound example of the iconic rear-engine platform
Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Minor interior wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained luxury sedan strikes the perfect balance between performance and sophistication. Finished in a stunning Deep Sea Blue Metallic, the exterior retains a brilliant shine, showing only minor signs of road use consistent with its age, such as light stone chips on the front fascia. Step inside to a cabin appointed with premium Oyster Dakota leather and fine-wood trim; the upholstery remains supple and clean, with only minimal creasing on the driver’s side bolster. Every feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the intuitive infotainment system and premium surround-sound, functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule with full service records available for review. The 19-inch alloy wheels are wrapped in high-performance tires with significant tread remaining. This vehicle has been garage-kept and smoke-free, offering a refined driving experience that feels tight and responsive on the road. It is a turn-key example of engineering excellence, ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies engineering excellence and reliable performance. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-appointed interior, this vehicle represents an exceptional investment for the discerning driver who values both quality and longevity.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and value. We invite you to experience a vehicle that upholds our commitment to excellence and reliability.

Hey everyone! 👋 I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride. It’s been such a reliable car and is still in wonderful shape, ready for plenty more adventures! It runs smoothly and has been really well taken care of. If you're looking for a solid, dependable vehicle that’s ready to hit the road today, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering high-revving linear power through its six individual throttle bodies and double VANOS variable valve timing. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis remains taut with documented rear subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral loads. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical vitals are robust, including a recent valve adjustment and cooling system overhaul. It retains its staggered Style 67 wheels, offering exceptional turn-in and mechanical grip for the driving purist.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This 2018 Audi S5 Sportback has been meticulously maintained and serves as a perfect blend of performance and practicality. Finished in a deep Navarra Blue Metallic, the exterior retains a brilliant luster, though a few minor stone chips on the front fascia reflect normal highway use. Inside, the Magma Red leather interior remains supple and smoke-free, with only light softening on the driver’s side bolster consistent with its mileage. Mechanically, the vehicle is in excellent health, benefiting from a documented service history at authorized intervals. The turbocharged V6 pulls strongly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the quattro all-wheel-drive system provides confident handling. Recent updates include a fresh set of Michelin Pilot Sport 4S tires and a full professional detailing. It is a reliable, eye-catching daily driver that is ready for its next enthusiast owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a superior value proposition for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a well-preserved interior, the unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity. While exhibiting minor cosmetic characteristics consistent with its history, the vehicle remains in commendable condition, offering a sophisticated driving experience and proven reliability. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate the exceptional caliber of this offering.

Presented for your consideration is this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, demonstrating mechanical excellence and aesthetic integrity. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents a superior value proposition for the discerning buyer who demands quality and longevity.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next road trip? I’m parting with my trusty car, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive! It’s in great shape, super clean, and has plenty of life left in it. I’ve taken really good care of it, so you can just hop in and go. Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS variable valve timing. Power is managed by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and sent to the rear wheels via an M-Variable Lock limited-slip differential. The chassis remains taut with recent bushing replacements and documented rear subframe reinforcement. This example retains its factory-spec suspension geometry and cross-drilled rotors, offering the tactile steering feedback and high-revving linear power delivery these chassis are renowned for. Mechanically sound and aesthetically preserved, it represents a turn-key opportunity for the purist driver.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between daily utility and refined comfort. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only the minor stone chips and light surface marks consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium leather seats exhibit gentle softening but remain free of tears or heavy wear, while the original carpeting has been protected by all-weather mats. Every feature, including the responsive touchscreen interface, dual-zone climate control, and heated seating, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is turn-key ready, having recently undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, a fresh oil change, and a brake pad replacement. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts without hesitation, and the tires have significant tread remaining. This is a solid, reliable example that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a refined balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive professional assessment to ensure that all core systems perform with the reliability and precision expected of a high-caliber pre-owned asset. With a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, this vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated and dependable transport solution.
